languages.text: На несколько километров вперед туннели наполняют истлевшие от времени укрепления и хрупкие как стекло древние орудия и вооружение. Разведчики с удивлением обнаруживают несколько наскоро собранных каменных курганов — вероятно, люди, побывавшие в этих туннелях, уже нашли все, что хотели, похоронили павших и оставили планету.

For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.
languages.original_text: На несколько километров вперед туннели наполняют истлевшие от времени укрепления и хрупкие как стекло древние орудия и вооружение. Разведчики с удивлением обнаруживают несколько наскоро собранных каменных курганов — вероятно, люди, побывавшие в этих туннелях, уже нашли все, что хотели, похоронили павших и оставили планету.

traits.locale_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

languages.text: 数キロ先まで続くトンネル内には、古びた要塞やガラスのように脆い古代の武器や装備が置かれている。偵察隊は、急いで石で作った墓をいくつか見つける。このトンネルで時間を過ごした人たちは、おそらく欲しいものをすべて見つけ、死者を埋葬し、この惑星を去ったのだろう。
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

traits.locale_text: 数キロ先まで続くトンネル内には、古びた要塞やガラスのように脆い古代の武器や装備が置かれている。偵察隊は、急いで石で作った墓をいくつか見つける。このトンネルで時間を過ごした人たちは、おそらく欲しいものをすべて見つけ、死者を埋葬し、この惑星を去ったのだろう。

languages.text: Durante los siguientes kilómetros, los túneles están llenos de fortificaciones desgastadas por el tiempo, armas antiguas y equipo tan frágil como el cristal. A los exploradores les sorprende encontrar madrigueras de piedra construidas de forma apresurada. La gente que pasó tiempo en estos túneles debió de encontrar lo que buscaba, enterró a sus muertos y abandonó el planeta.
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

traits.locale_text: Durante los siguientes kilómetros, los túneles están llenos de fortificaciones desgastadas por el tiempo, armas antiguas y equipo tan frágil como el cristal. A los exploradores les sorprende encontrar madrigueras de piedra construidas de forma apresurada. La gente que pasó tiempo en estos túneles debió de encontrar lo que buscaba, enterró a sus muertos y abandonó el planeta.

languages.text: 前方数公里的隧道中，遍布饱经风霜的防御工事，以及脆弱如玻璃的古老武器装备。考察队还惊讶地发现了几座仓促堆砌的石冢——曾驻留此地的人或许已得偿所愿，在埋葬逝者后，离开了这颗行星。
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

traits.locale_text: 前方数公里的隧道中，遍布饱经风霜的防御工事，以及脆弱如玻璃的古老武器装备。考察队还惊讶地发现了几座仓促堆砌的石冢——曾驻留此地的人或许已得偿所愿，在埋葬逝者后，离开了这颗行星。

languages.text: Die Gänge sind auf mehrere Kilometer mit abgenutzten Befestigungen und alten Waffen versehen, die zerbrechlich wie Glas sind. Zu ihrer Überraschung entdecken die Späher mehrere hastig errichtete Steingräber ... die Leute, die in diesen Gängen waren, haben den Planeten offenbar verlassen, nachdem sie alles gefunden und ihre Toten begraben hatten.
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

traits.locale_text: Die Gänge sind auf mehrere Kilometer mit abgenutzten Befestigungen und alten Waffen versehen, die zerbrechlich wie Glas sind. Zu ihrer Überraschung entdecken die Späher mehrere hastig errichtete Steingräber ... die Leute, die in diesen Gängen waren, haben den Planeten offenbar verlassen, nachdem sie alles gefunden und ihre Toten begraben hatten.

languages.text: İlerideki birkaç kilometre boyunca tüneller, zamanla aşınmış tahkimatlar ve cam kadar kırılgan kadim silahlar ve ekipmanlarla dolu. İzciler, aceleyle inşa edilmiş birkaç taş höyük bulunca şaşırıyor. Bu tünellerde zaman geçiren insanlar; muhtemelen istedikleri her şeyi çoktan bulmuş, ölülerini gömmüş ve gezegeni terk etmiş.
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.

traits.locale_text: İlerideki birkaç kilometre boyunca tüneller, zamanla aşınmış tahkimatlar ve cam kadar kırılgan kadim silahlar ve ekipmanlarla dolu. İzciler, aceleyle inşa edilmiş birkaç taş höyük bulunca şaşırıyor. Bu tünellerde zaman geçiren insanlar; muhtemelen istedikleri her şeyi çoktan bulmuş, ölülerini gömmüş ve gezegeni terk etmiş.

languages.text: Sur plusieurs kilomètres, les tunnels sont tapissés de fortifications usées par le temps et d'armes et d'équipements anciens aussi fragiles que du verre. Les éclaireurs sont surpris de trouver plusieurs tumulus de pierres assemblés à la hâte ; les personnes qui ont passé du temps dans ces tunnels ont visiblement trouvé ce qu'elles cherchaient, enterré leurs morts et quitté la planète sans demander leur reste.
languages.original_text: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.
